description: Experience the essence of style and fashion with our live event announcement email template, designed for the illustrious Paris Fashion Week. Carry the seasonal fashion trends from the world's fashion capital right into your audience's inbox. This template, perfect for fashion week announcements, elegantly combines sophistication with the latest trends. Whether you're a fashion brand, designer, or an event planner, this template is your perfect companion to engage your audience with the most awaited fashion event of the season. Get ready to immerse your subscribers in the vibrant world of fashion with a single click!
short_description: Immerse your audience in the glamour of Paris Fashion Week with our live event announcement email template. Perfect for fashion brands or event planners, it elegantly brings seasonal trends to your subscribers. Engage with style!

designer.description: I am a Chicago-based graphic designer. I specialize in working with natural brands. I can work with you remotely or in-person as your creative partner to tackle branding and marketing projects of any format, digital or print. Let's make something amazing together.

WEEK

 

ATTEND THE MODÈLE EXCLUSIVE PREMIERE

01 . 30 . 21 ~ 5PM

Join us for our exclusive Paris Fashion Week collection reveal. See the all new Spring 2021 Collection. From designers: Hansel Burgess, and Bev Deslin.

WATCH THE SNEAK PREVIEW

Hansel Burgess

Hansel’s unique style melds bold, heroic imagery with clean, wearable fashion.

Discover The Collection

Bev Deslin

Bev has taken the fashion world by storm, her eye-catching work is unmistakable.

Behind The Collection
